lesson-resilient-fallback.title: Resilient model fallback
lesson-resilient-fallback.content: Keep heuristic fallback active and route critical stages through the most reliable reachable provider.
lesson-resilient-fallback.instruction: Prefer resilient fallback paths and log provider failures into memory.

lesson-evidence-first.title: Evidence before planning
lesson-evidence-first.content: Preserve intake, evidence discovery, and survey before committing to implementation decisions.
lesson-evidence-first.instruction: Anchor planning choices in evidence coverage before expanding the task graph.

lesson-experiment-grounding.title: Experiments ground the report
lesson-experiment-grounding.content: Keep experiment outputs in the writer loop so the final report reflects actual evidence and ablations.
lesson-experiment-grounding.instruction: Route experiment summaries and failure motifs into the report graph before drafting.

lesson-topology-adaptation.title: Sparse mesh swarm coordination
lesson-topology-adaptation.content: Coordination works better when planner, memory, and coordinator remain the routing hubs instead of a flat broadcast pattern.
lesson-topology-adaptation.instruction: Keep high-value swarm traffic sparse and route novelty or failures through hub agents.

lesson-cross-run-reflection.title: Cross-run reflection loop
lesson-cross-run-reflection.content: Each run should reuse prior lessons, not restart from a blank slate.
lesson-cross-run-reflection.instruction: Load prior lessons at stage start and record any new adaptation back into the learning graph.

lesson-live-provider-available.title: Reachable model path
lesson-live-provider-available.content: A reachable model endpoint should be reused for synthesis-heavy stages before falling back.
lesson-live-provider-available.instruction: Bias synthesis and writing stages toward the reachable provider path while keeping fallback enabled.
